# castToRaw()

## Overview

The `castToRaw()` function casts a string to a blob string.

## Syntax

`castToRaw(value)`

| <div table-width=20>Augment</div> | <div table-width=20>Type</div> | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| `value` | String | The value to be converted |

<b>Return type: </b>Blob

## Example of Result

```uql
with "data:image/png;base64," as base64
insert().into(@default).nodes({profile_photo: castToRaw(base64)}) as n
return n.profile_photo
```
